zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha von Lothringen於1113年出生在法國時，她的父親Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine38歲，母親Adelheid van Leuven24歲。她於1134年與Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1179年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha von Lothringen于1113年出生在法国时，她的父亲Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine38岁，母亲Adelheid van Leuven24岁。她于1134年与Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1179年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha von Lothringen was born in 1113, in France, her father, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, was 38 and her mother, Adelheid van Leuven, was 24. She married Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große in 1134. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1179, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha von Lothringen est née en 1113, à France, son père, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Leuven, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große en 1134. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1179, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha von Lothringen 1113 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine 38 und ihre Mutter Adelheid van Leuven 24. Sie hat 1134 Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1179 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha von Lothringen è nata il nel 1113 nel Francia, sua padre, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Adelheid van Leuven, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große nel 1134. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1179, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha von Lothringenが1113年にフランスで生まれた時，父Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraineは38歳，母Adelheid van Leuvenは24歳であった。1134年にHerman III. von Baden genannt der Großeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1179年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha von Lothringen(이)가 1113년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid van Leuven(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1134년 Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1179년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha von Lothringen nasceu em 1113, em França, seu pai, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Leuven, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große em 1134. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1179, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha von Lothringen родилась в 1113 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Leuven, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große в 1134 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1179 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha von Lothringen nació en 1113, en Francia, su papá, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Leuven, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große en 1134. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1179, a la edad de 66 años.
